name: HRC_TXN_CONSOLE_ENTRY
description: This table holds Admin console details

columns.Name: CONSOLE_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key and unique identifier

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRC_TXN_HEADER table

columns.Name: OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: The presentable name of the main business object being changed

columns.Name: PROCESS_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: The category grouping this process is in e.g. Employment

columns.Name: CONSOLE_TXN_STATUS
columns.Comments: The status of the transaction to control how it appears in the Admin Console.

columns.Name: STATUS_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: The category of the status like Pending, Completed, Failed, Draft.

columns.Name: CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: The effective date of the changes in this transaction

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: The TaskId of the main approval request BPM task

columns.Name: TASK_STATE
columns.Comments: The State of the main approval request BPM task

columns.Name: TASK_OUTCOME
columns.Comments: The final outcome of the main approval request BPM task

columns.Name: TASK_APPROVERS
columns.Comments: The list of approvers of the worklist task

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_INITIATOR_USER_NAME
columns.Comments: transaction initiator user name in case it is different than the value in the WHO columns

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_IDENTIFICATION_KEY
columns.Comments: task identification key in case it is different than transaction id or object id.

columns.Name: SR_NUMBER
columns.Comments: User entered SR number relating to this issue

columns.Name: TXN_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to txngroups table

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_VARCHAR_1
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_VARCHAR_2
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_VARCHAR_3
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_VARCHAR_4
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_NUMBER_1
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_NUMBER_2
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_NUMBER_3
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_NUMBER_4
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_DATE_1
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: HRC_TXN_CUSTOM_DATE_2
columns.Comments: This column has been added to this table for Custom Use.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
